metadata.description: Language-agnostic workflow plugins for Claude Code — cross-model AI collaboration, rebase automation, changelog generation, and TDD workflows

plugins.name: weave
plugins.description: Weave prompts across Claude, Antigravity, and GPT in parallel — brainstorm, refine, plan, execute, architect, review, and synthesize the best of all models

plugins.name: rebase
plugins.description: Automated rebase onto trunk with conflict prediction, resolution, and quality gate verification

plugins.name: changelog
plugins.description: Generate categorized changelog entries from branch commits and PR context

plugins.name: tdd
plugins.description: TDD bug-fix workflow — reproduce bugs as failing tests, find root cause, fix, and verify

plugins.name: commit
plugins.description: Create git commits following project conventions with format enforcement and safety checks

plugins.name: model-cli
plugins.description: Run prompts through individual AI CLIs — Antigravity/agy (Gemini), codex/GPT, and cursor/agent with fallback support

plugins.name: pr
plugins.description: Generate and review gold-standard PR descriptions; detect AI slop, brittle counts, and verbose commit messages on branch commits and resolve via fixup commits and autosquash with quality-gate checks

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Clone and study your project's dependencies at the exact versions you use — source repos with version-pinned git worktrees

plugins.name: slop
plugins.description: Scan repo tracked files for AI slop, brittle counts, and verbose noise; resolve each finding as an atomic forward-going commit with quality-gate verification

plugins.name: tailwind
plugins.description: Detect and fix inconsistent spacing in Tailwind CSS layouts — container fragmentation, margin/gap mixing, padding asymmetry, and more

plugins.name: pytest-optimizer
plugins.description: Profile a pytest suite, rank safe speedups with a safety-first rubric, and apply each as its own verified commit

plugins.name: spike
plugins.description: Prove a path fast in a no-commit spike — a single probe or a bakeoff of competing strategies in git worktrees — exit through the project's quality gates into stashes, and hand back a commit-by-commit implementation plan

plugins.name: review
plugins.description: Address code-review findings on the current branch — provenance-gated to changes the branch introduced, one finding per commit, simplest pragmatic fix, with quality gates before every commit and prompted history rewrites

plugins.name: action
plugins.description: Take tickets to branches in isolated git worktrees — resolve Linear/GitHub issues strictly read-only, name branches by the team's own conventions, land gated commits, and fan out multiple tickets in parallel
